name: auditx
description: One command. Every vulnerability, dead code, and AI-generated code anti-pattern. JSON output built for AI coding agents to parse and self-fix.

tools.name: audit_codebase
tools.description: Runs a complete security, quality, SAST, dependency, and AI-pattern audit on any codebase folder, returning structured findings that AI agents can parse and immediately use to self-fix code.
